news.title: Apple (AAPL) Sues OpenAI Over AI Hardware Trade Secrets
news.summary: Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) has filed a federal lawsuit against OpenAI alleging theft of trade secrets tied to its AI hardware work. The complaint centers on claims that former Apple employees took confidential materials and shared them with OpenAI. The filing escalates a public feud involving senior tech leaders and highlights rising rivalry across AI hardware and software. Apple enters this legal fight while its stock trades at $315.32, with the company up 16.4% year to date and 49.9% over the...

news.title: Here’s How Nancy Pelosi Beat the Stock Market and Warren Buffett
news.summary: The S&P 500 has delivered roughly 13% annualized returns over the past decade, one of the strongest bull runs in modern history. Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-A)(NYSE:BRK-B), long the gold standard for patient capital, has matched that pace with about 13% annually over the same stretch. Impressive numbers for most investors. Yet both look like amateur hour next to the woman still serving out her final term in Congress: Nancy Pelosi.

news.title: Stock Futures Are Falling, Oil Rising After New Strikes Over Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: Stock futures are falling after the U.S. said it launched new strikes on Iran Sunday evening.  The announcement, by U.S. Central Command, which said it was at the orders of the Commander in Chief, said the strikes began at 5 p.m. Eastern time.  Just after 6 p.m. Eastern time, S&P 500 futures were down 0.3%, while Nasdaq 100 futures were down 0.5%, and Dow futures were down 0.3%.
